scripts.check:node: node -e "const major=parseInt(process.versions.node.split('.')[0],10); if(major<20||major>=23){console.error('Unsupported Node '+process.version+'. Use Node 20.x, 21.x, or 22.x.'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.dev: npm run check:node && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run check:node && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
